name: build-case-study-house
description: Build the three-layer case study house example: structure (4x3 column grid), panels (perimeter walls with apertures), slabs (tactile3d floor). Configures bay A in place. Does NOT remove default bays B and C; the watcher ignores them once their apertures and walls stay defaulted off, but for a pristine demo load case-study-house.state.json directly.
commands: set bay A label "Case Study House"
aperture A add w_s1 window x 0 4 8 4
aperture A add w_s2 window x 0 36 8 4
aperture A add d_n1 door x 2 6 3 7
aperture A add w_n1 window x 2 24 12 4
aperture A add w_e1 window y 3 6 12 4
aperture A add w_w1 window y 0 6 12 4
